vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

verify.value: All required elements are present.

risk.desc: Insufficient access to equipment bay may hinder maintenance.
risk.mit: Design access windows and ensure clear paths for service.

risk.desc: Threaded connections into printed walls may not have adequate engagement depth.
risk.mit: Use inserts or bosses with sufficient engagement depth.

risk.desc: Tolerance mismatch between subsystems may cause fit issues.
risk.mit: Ensure all interfaces have stack_up_mm and fit_class defined.

risk.desc: Process limitations may affect the final part quality.
risk.mit: Review manufacturing process and adjust geometry as necessary.

risk.desc: Overclaiming on part accuracy may lead to unrealistic expectations.
risk.mit: Set realistic tolerances based on manufacturing capabilities.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Equipment bay, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon mount

manufacturing_strategy.support: FDM build direction aligned with spar
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: visual and tactile inspection of bolt holes, cooling inlet, and equipment bay access

verification_focus.description: Check bolt pattern and motor mount holes for correct size and alignment
Verify cooling inlet is aligned with motor pod and free of obstructions
Ensure equipment bay access is unobstructed and harness path is clear

generated_parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
generated_parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

requirements: Provide a 2-piece centerjoint main spar for a fixed-wing UAV with a 2m wingspan
Ensure the spar is resistant to salt-air and capable of high-wind launches
Include an anti-rotation key, rib, carry-through, and frame for continuous load path

verify.rule: All required evidence_features present and referenced.
mass_est_g is a numeric grams value.
P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.
Adjacent interfaces and mounting datums are named with exact neighboring subsystem labels.
Critical joints have visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence.
Boundary conditions include fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces.

risk.desc: Potential for salt-air corrosion affecting fasteners and structural integrity.
risk.mit: Apply corrosion-resistant coatings and use stainless steel fasteners.

risk.desc: High wind launch may cause unexpected loads on the wing spar.
risk.mit: Conduct wind tunnel tests to validate design loads and adjust if necessary.

risk.desc: Thermal expansion may affect alignment of critical interfaces.
risk.mit: Include thermal expansion joints and flexible connectors in design.

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance for moving parts may cause binding or failure.
risk.mit: Review and adjust clearances for all moving interfaces.

risk.desc: Potential for misalignment during assembly due to complex interfaces.
risk.mit: Develop detailed assembly instructions and conduct pilot assembly trials.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path

physics_paths.description: Transfers wing bending and servo loads to fuselage
Heat from sun exposure is transferred to the wing skin
Servo motion is transferred to ribs via hinges
Airflow over the wing generates lift
Electrical power and data are routed from the wing root to ribs

risk.desc: Failure to maintain structural integrity due to spar socket and anti-rotation keys.
risk.mit: Conduct detailed structural analysis and ensure proper material selection and design.

risk.desc: Potential for control surface actuation issues due to hinge line and cutout design.
risk.mit: Review mechanical design and perform actuation tests to ensure smooth operation.

risk.desc: Inadequate heat dissipation from internal components.
risk.mit: Enhance thermal design and conduct thermal analysis to ensure proper heat dissipation.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Wing planform, airfoil section evidence, winglets, elevon/control surface cutouts with hinges

physics_paths.description: Wing rib load path from leading edge to trailing edge via spar and anti-rotation keys
Airflow over wing rib following NACA airfoil profile
Heat dissipation from internal components to exterior air
Elevon control surface motion via hinge line and actuator
Sensor data and control signals from wing rib to fuselage

integration_opportunities.description: Integrate wing rib with spar for load transfer
Connect control surface via hinge line for actuation
Enhance heat dissipation from internal components

manufacturing_strategy.support: orientation: vertical, inspection: visual and CMM

verification_focus.description: Ensure spar socket and anti-rotation keys maintain structural integrity
Verify hinge line and control surface cutout allow smooth actuation
Check heat dissipation from internal components is adequate

risk.desc: Potential for salt-air corrosion affecting servo longevity.
risk.mit: Apply corrosion-resistant coatings and use salt-resistant materials.

risk.desc: Risk of high-wind launch causing structural damage.
risk.mit: Conduct wind tunnel tests to validate structural integrity under high-wind conditions.

risk.desc: Possibility of thermal cycling causing material fatigue.
risk.mit: Include thermal cycling tests in the verification plan.

risk.desc: Risk of electrical harness damage due to inadequate strain relief.
risk.mit: Ensure all cable exits have strain relief geometry and follow minimum bend radius guidelines.

risk.desc: Potential for mis-mating connectors due to lack of keying.
risk.mit: Implement keying or labeling on connectors to prevent mis-mating.

risk.desc: Salt-air resistant materials may degrade over time in harsh offshore conditions.
risk.mit: Regular inspection and maintenance schedule to replace degraded components.

risk.desc: Assembly sequence may be ambiguous if not clearly defined.
